assumptions: No Airbyte Cloud account or workspace exists.
A browser is available; no local Docker or Python SDK is assumed.

developer_goal: Create an Airbyte Cloud trial workspace, configure Sample Data, add a destination, and complete a first successful sync.

first_success.outcome: An Airbyte Cloud connection completes a successful sync from Sample Data into a configured destination.
first_success.observable_signal: The connection page shows a successful sync status after Set up connection and initiating a sync.

route_selection.surface: Airbyte Cloud Sample Data source to first successful sync
route_selection.rule: Measure documented developer onboarding: account creation through first success. Prefer the vendor quickstart or hosted API/console path when one exists.
route_selection.selected: Airbyte Cloud Sample Data source to first successful sync

candidates.name: Airbyte Cloud Sample Data source to first successful sync
candidates.reason: Airbyte Cloud is the hosted onboarding path. Official docs direct developers who do not want to self-manage to cloud.airbyte.com/signup, and the getting-started source guide uses Marketplace Sample Data as the popular test source before destination and connection setup. PyAirbyte and local Core are local/self-managed alternatives, not the Cloud onboarding path.

required_path.action: Sign up for Airbyte Cloud and open the workspace.
required_path.observable_result: Sources and Destinations navigation is reachable.

required_path.action: Add a Sample Data source from Marketplace and complete Set up source so the connection test succeeds.
required_path.observable_result: Source test succeeds and New Connection is offered.

required_path.action: Add a destination connector and complete its setup test.
Create a connection linking the source and destination, configure schema, and click Set up connection.
Initiate a sync from the connection page.

prerequisites.description: Supported browser to use the Cloud UI.

sources.title: Manage billing and credits (Start a trial)
evidence_supported: Trial begins after first successful sync

uncertainties.question: Which destination does Cloud onboarding recommend first for Sample Data on a brand-new trial?
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Add-connection docs require a destination but do not mandate one specific first destination for Sample Data.
